records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't go.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it's something the Supreme Administrator has to risk his life for, then I suggest you just let it go. It's just we've lost contact with him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it's something the Supreme Administrator has to risk his life for, then I suggest you just let it go. It's just we've lost contact with him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know how the Northern Union treats the Administration, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you worried about me?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you worried about me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, I am!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, I am!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, I am!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the Supreme Administrator is taken hostage, the Administration's reputation and credibility will crash! All because of you!

records.m_Talk_FRA: If the Supreme Administrator is taken hostage, the Administration's reputation and credibility will crash! All because of you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I said that it was an employee of mine, but she's also a key factor I need for the next Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I said that it was an employee of mine, but she's also a key factor I need for the next Qliphoth Game.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I said that it was an employee of mine, but she's also a key factor I need for the next Qliphoth Game.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, if something has happened to her, I must do whatever I can to bring her back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, if something has happened to her, I must do whatever I can to bring her back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, if something has happened to her, I must do whatever I can to bring her back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I warned you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I warned you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I warned you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just know that the moment I see news of your kidnapping, I'm going to quit my job as a Senior and find a different job.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Just know that the moment I see news of your kidnapping, I'm going to quit my job as a Senior and find a different job.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be careful not to let that happen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I'll be back before you know it.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I'll be back before you know it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Take one of my contacts with you too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's more likely that we can't contact her due to a simple device issue, since we lost contact near a Crevice with dense Corruption rays.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm glad you have a positive outlook on this. It seemed that you undervalued your skills on your resume.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This Isolde person. I was worried because you said she had a quirky personality, but I'm glad she was cooperative in the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This Isolde person. I was worried because you said she had a quirky personality, but I'm glad she was cooperative in the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This Isolde person. I was worried because you said she had a quirky personality, but I'm glad she was cooperative in the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She looked young from afar, and I think it's amazing that she became a Senior of the Administration at such a young age.

records.m_Talk_FRA: She looked young from afar, and I think it's amazing that she became a Senior of the Administration at such a young age.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Isolde is not only curious, but also has a strong desire for recognition.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought she wouldn't be able to refuse if I offered her a Senior position instead of a regular researcher.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought she wouldn't be able to refuse if I offered her a Senior position instead of a regular researcher.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I said that it was an employee of mine, but she's also a key factor I need for the next Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I said that it was an employee of mine, but she's also a key factor I need for the next Qliphoth Game.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I said that it was an employee of mine, but she's also a key factor I need for the next Qliphoth Game.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, if something has happened to her, I must do whatever I can to bring her back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, if something has happened to her, I must do whatever I can to bring her back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, if something has happened to her, I must do whatever I can to bring her back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh* I warned you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh* I warned you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh* I warned you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just know that the moment I see news of your kidnapping, I'm going to quit my job as a Senior and find a different job.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Just know that the moment I see news of your kidnapping, I'm going to quit my job as a Senior and find a different job.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be careful not to let that happen.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be careful not to let that happen.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be careful not to let that happen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, I'll be back before you know it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, I'll be back before you know it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, I'll be back before you know it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Take one of my contacts with you too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Take one of my contacts with you too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Take one of my contacts with you too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have a right to know what you are up to as a Senior.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I have a right to know what you are up to as a Senior.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I have a right to know what you are up to as a Senior.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Contact?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pleased to meet you, sir.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pleased to meet you, sir.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pleased to meet you, sir.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I am Fatima, Chief of Lotus' security. It is an honor to serve as your bodyguard.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I am Fatima, Chief of Lotus' security. It is an honor to serve as your bodyguard.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I am Fatima, Chief of Lotus' security. It is an honor to serve as your bodyguard.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please feel free to address me as Fatima.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please feel free to address me as Fatima.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please feel free to address me as Fatima.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't you say you didn't want to use any of the Administration's personnel to avoid any conflict with the Northern Union?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't you say you didn't want to use any of the Administration's personnel to avoid any conflict with the Northern Union?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't you say you didn't want to use any of the Administration's personnel to avoid any conflict with the Northern Union?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's been thrown out the window when the Supreme Administrator said that he'd go there himself.

root.m_Talk_FRA: That's been thrown out the window when the Supreme Administrator said that he'd go there himself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just don't try to get their attention, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just don't try to get their attention, okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just don't try to get their attention, okay?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Is it okay for me to take your bodyguard with me? What if Swan comes after you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's fine. If Swan really does come for me, then I'll give her all the information she wants and beg for my life.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's fine. If Swan really does come for me, then I'll give her all the information she wants and beg for my life.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's fine. If Swan really does come for me, then I'll give her all the information she wants and beg for my life.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever the case, it's far better than you getting caught, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever the case, it's far better than you getting caught, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever the case, it's far better than you getting caught, isn't it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm busy, so I have to get back to my lab.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm busy, so I have to get back to my lab.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm busy, so I have to get back to my lab.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fatima, if the Supreme Administrator does anything stupid, report it through the hotline.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Understood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please sign here.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Very well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Very well.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I've noticed that there aren't any clauses written on this document. Why did you need my signature?

root.m_Talk_FRA: For my personal collection.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I... see.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I... see.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I... see.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?

root.m_Talk_DEU: If something like that has happened, then you should've taken me as well!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If something like that has happened, then you should've taken me as well!

root.m_Talk_ENG: What you're telling me is that our Division Commander might be in danger, Boss!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What you're telling me is that our Division Commander might be in danger, Boss!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What you're telling me is that our Division Commander might be in danger, Boss!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That is, only if you assume the worst.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That is, only if you assume the worst.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That is, only if you assume the worst.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But don't worry, Mina. Commander Hilde won't fall into danger so easily.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But don't worry, Mina. Commander Hilde won't fall into danger so easily.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But don't worry, Mina. Commander Hilde won't fall into danger so easily.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh...?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... Commander in danger? It is hard to imagine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... Commander in danger? It is hard to imagine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's more likely that we can't contact her due to a simple device issue, since we lost contact near a Crevice with dense Corruption rays.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's more likely that we can't contact her due to a simple device issue, since we lost contact near a Crevice with dense Corruption rays.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's more likely that we can't contact her due to a simple device issue, since we lost contact near a Crevice with dense Corruption rays.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just going there to check. So Mina, you should focus on your recovery until your next mission.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just going there to check. So Mina, you should focus on your recovery until your next mission.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just going there to check. So Mina, you should focus on your recovery until your next mission.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be back before your scheduled discharge, so let's have dinner together then.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be back before your scheduled discharge, so let's have dinner together then.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? That sounds like some ominous foreshadowing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? That sounds like some ominous foreshadowing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? That sounds like some ominous foreshadowing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't you know? It's a trend to put a twist on cliches these days.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That you'll call me if something really big happens.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That you'll call me if something really big happens.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That you'll call me if something really big happens.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is this also a foreshadowing that you'll come to save me in a moment of crisis, Mina?

root.m_Talk_FRA: Is this also a foreshadowing that you'll come to save me in a moment of crisis, Mina?

root.m_Talk_DEU: Be safe out there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Be safe out there.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Supreme Administrator, we are ready to depart.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Supreme Administrator, we are ready to depart.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be right there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be right there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be right there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you ready as well?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you ready as well?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you ready as well?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hup!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hup!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hup!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think I brought everything I need... Or were you talking about mental preparation?

root.m_Talk_FRA: I think I brought everything I need... Or were you talking about mental preparation?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I have plenty of experience jumping into the middle of enemy territory, so I'm good.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I have plenty of experience jumping into the middle of enemy territory, so I'm good.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm glad you have a positive outlook on this. It seemed that you undervalued your skills on your resume.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm glad you have a positive outlook on this. It seemed that you undervalued your skills on your resume.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's because I learned that lifespans shorten with an inflated ego after going through several commanders replaced.

root.m_Talk_FRA: That's because I learned that lifespans shorten with an inflated ego after going through several commanders replaced.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But there is an Administration confirmed Grade S Counter with us on this operation. So, even someone like me can stay positive.

root.m_Talk_FRA: But there is an Administration confirmed Grade S Counter with us on this operation. So, even someone like me can stay positive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's also true.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's also true.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's also true.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This Isolde person. I was worried because you said she had a quirky personality, but I'm glad she was cooperative in the end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This Isolde person. I was worried because you said she had a quirky personality, but I'm glad she was cooperative in the end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This Isolde person. I was worried because you said she had a quirky personality, but I'm glad she was cooperative in the end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She looked young from afar, and I think it's amazing that she became a Senior of the Administration at such a young age.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She looked young from afar, and I think it's amazing that she became a Senior of the Administration at such a young age.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She looked young from afar, and I think it's amazing that she became a Senior of the Administration at such a young age.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Isolde is not only curious, but also has a strong desire for recognition.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Isolde is not only curious, but also has a strong desire for recognition.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Isolde is not only curious, but also has a strong desire for recognition.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I thought she wouldn't be able to refuse if I offered her a Senior position instead of a regular researcher.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I thought she wouldn't be able to refuse if I offered her a Senior position instead of a regular researcher.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I thought she wouldn't be able to refuse if I offered her a Senior position instead of a regular researcher.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If she had devoted herself entirely to research at Future-at-War as she planned, she would've already developed an Eternium Drive that is competitive against the Administration's through reverse engineering.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If she had devoted herself entirely to research at Future-at-War as she planned, she would've already developed an Eternium Drive that is competitive against the Administration's through reverse engineering.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If she had devoted herself entirely to research at Future-at-War as she planned, she would've already developed an Eternium Drive that is competitive against the Administration's through reverse engineering.

root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?!

root.m_Talk_FRA: Wouldn't it have been better to let a genius like her do what she's good at, then?

root.m_Talk_FRA: There is a good reason why the Administration has been hiding its technology from the world.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Simply put, if technology goes past what the era can allow, a Counterside Effect in the form of data corruption will occur.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Simply put, if technology goes past what the era can allow, a Counterside Effect in the form of data corruption will occur.

8v

root.m_Talk_FRA: The Administration appointed Miss Isolde as a Senior to stop the world from being Corrupted?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's not to say that she's not capable of being a Senior, but yes, that's what it boils down to.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Look at those curves. I'm sure the inside is even more beautiful, right?
